Name: WEAPON_GEN_PARAM_ST
Description: Determine the blood gem generation parameters for a weapon generation.

Fields.Name: Weapon ID
Fields.Description: The item ID for the weapon used by this generation.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Shape: Slot 0
Fields.Description: The blood gem shape type for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Effect: Slot 0
Fields.Description: The blood gem effect generation for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Shape: Slot 1
Fields.Description: The blood gem shape type for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Effect: Slot 1
Fields.Description: The blood gem effect generation for slot 1.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Shape: Slot 2
Fields.Description: The blood gem shape type for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Effect: Slot 2
Fields.Description: The blood gem effect generation for slot 2.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Shape: Slot 3
Fields.Description: The blood gem shape type for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Effect: Slot 3
Fields.Description: The blood gem effect generation for slot 3.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Shape: Slot 4
Fields.Description: The blood gem shape type for slot 4.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Effect: Slot 4
Fields.Description: The blood gem effect generation for slot 4.

Fields.Name: Blood Gem Classification Mask
Fields.Description: The classification mask used for this generation.

Fields.Name: Reserved Blood Gem Slot: 0
Fields.Description: The reversed blood gem slot for slot 0.

Fields.Name: Reserved Blood Gem Slot: 1
Fields.Description: The reversed blood gem slot for slot1.

Fields.Name: Reserved Blood Gem Slot: 2
Fields.Description: The reversed blood gem slot for slot 2.
